nasb.text: They made a proclamation throughout Judah and Jerusalem to all the exiles, that they should assemble at Jerusalem,

esv.text: And a proclamation was made throughout Judah and Jerusalem to all the returned exiles that they should assemble at Jerusalem,

cnv.text: 於是，領袖們就在猶大和耶路撒冷向所有被擄歸回的人發出通告，叫他們到耶路撒冷聚集。

ccb.text: 他们在犹大和耶路撒冷发出通告，要求所有流亡归来的人在耶路撒冷集合。
